comment: watch: true now polls the block number so watched queries actually refresh (poll cadence follows refetchInterval, no double-fetch); useEvents forwards enabled/retry/refetchInterval; remove the non-functional autoConnect prop; clear the account when the wallet reports an empty accounts list; chain-scoped query keys. useExplorer returns null for chains without the configured explorer instead of throwing; paymaster hooks error clearly on chains without a configured paymaster instead of silently querying the default sepolia endpoint.
